summary: Added local Milestone Runway lenses so each lane Overview can switch between All, Gates, Unlocks, Events, and Future route layers without changing snapshot data.

pattern_notes: Segmented controls are appropriate for closely related choices that immediately affect the visible object or view.
Quest-log interfaces commonly separate active, completed, hidden, and task-filtered states so operators do not scan unrelated records.
Gamified progress works best when filters reveal meaningful milestones, blockers, and achievements instead of adding decoration alone.
The Atlas lens row should stay local and reversible so it helps operators inspect a lane without mutating control-plane records.

data_contract: state.milestoneLensByLane stores browser-local active lenses by lane id.
milestoneLensOptions(nodes) derives All, Gates, Unlocks, Events, and Future counts from existing runway nodes.
milestoneNodeMatchesLens(node, lens) filters existing checkpoint, gate, unlock, and event nodes without adding new schema.
The Future lens renders only the generated future-slot card; empty filtered states render an explanatory runway card.
ui_notes: Lens controls use a segmented, count-first button layout with aria-pressed state.
Non-All lenses apply a subtle runway sweep animation and the future slot has a lightweight pulse.
The lens grid uses container-aware auto-fit columns so narrow detail panes on wide layouts do not clip labels.

red.result: Expected failure before implementation: lensCount 0, lenses [], hasActiveLens false, hasLensStats false, initialNodes 15, errors []

green.result: ok true; All 15 nodes; Gates 2 gate-like nodes; Unlocks 3 unlock nodes; Events 5 event nodes; Future 1 future node; every lens became active with no clipped text or console errors.

responsive: phone 390: ok true, active blockers, lensCount 5, nodes 2, lensColumns 2, pageOverflow false, clipped []
tablet 820: ok true, active blockers, lensCount 5, nodes 2, lensColumns 2, pageOverflow false, clipped []
desktop 1280: ok true, active blockers, lensCount 5, nodes 2, no page overflow, clipped []
wide 1600: ok true after auto-fit fix, active blockers, lensCount 5, nodes 2, lensColumns 2, pageOverflow false, clipped []
static: ASCII verified for web/index.html, web/app.js, web/styles.css, web/README.md

next_actions: Add lane-specific lens skins so different minigame families can change the Runway visual tone.
Persist optional operator lens preferences in localStorage if repeated lane reviews need memory.
Connect a future visual asset generator to the Future lens so each realm can preview a different next-slot texture.
